name: Vontier Corp
summary: PART I General Vontier Corporation (Vontier, the Company, we, or our) is a global industrial technology company uniting productivity, automation and multi-energy technologies to meet the needs of a rapidly evolving, more connected mobility ecosystem. Leveraging leading market positions, decades of domain expertise and unparalleled portfolio breadth, Vontier powers the way the world moves, delivering smart, safe and sustainable solutions to our customers and the planet.
